duck.thermal_notes: Significant lipid concentration. Requires careful low-temperature management to avoid sulfur bonds.

quail.thermal_notes: Rapid thermal penetration due to low volume. High risk of overcooking.

goose.thermal_notes: Massive thermal inertia. Requires extended equilibration time.

phase_descriptions.title: Protein Denaturation
phase_descriptions.description: Hydrogen bonds are breaking; albumen proteins begin to unfold.

phase_descriptions.title: Albumen Lattice Formation
phase_descriptions.description: The egg white is forming a semi-solid network (Setting).

phase_descriptions.title: Vitellin Gelation
phase_descriptions.description: The yolk is reaching a custard-like state (The Golden Zone).

phase_descriptions.title: Gel Network Stabilization
phase_descriptions.description: Molecular structure tightening. Approaching definitive set.

phase_descriptions.title: Ferrous Sulfide Window
phase_descriptions.description: Final 5%. Rapid cooling required soon to prevent graying.
